---
title: "OLS Regression to Predict Median House Values"
description: "A project that used R, OLS Regression and a variety of other methods to predict median house values in Philadelphia."
author: "Robert Mullins"
date: 2025-01-20
image: "/images/house.jpg"

categories: [Data Analytics, R]
---

## Overview

This analysis uses multiple OLS regression to investigate the drivers of median house values across Philadelphia, finding that education levels and poverty rates were the strongest predictors. The model explained 66% of variance in house values, though spatial clustering in the data raised concerns about the independence assumption.

::: {.callout-note}
This project was completed as part of "Spatial Econometrics and Data" at Waseda University, Japan. 
:::

## Read the full report

[{{< fa file-pdf >}} Read Full Report](/projects/reports/median_house.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary target="_blank"}

<iframe src="/projects/reports/median_house.pdf" 
        width="100%" 
        height="800px"
        style="border: none; border-radius: 8px;">
</iframe>

---
